result.summary: Analyzed the page and identified two layout and content presentation issues.

issues.description: The yellow action button in the top-right header is completely blank without any text label.
issues.suggestion: Add the appropriate call-to-action text, such as 'Join' or 'Log In', to the button.

issues.description: The 'SCROLL DOWN' overlay badge overlaps and obscures the legal disclaimer text near the bottom.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the z-index, spacing, or visibility conditions of the scroll prompt to prevent text overlap.
